title: Surviving Sepsis Campaign 2021
summary: 脓毒症与脓毒性休克初始复苏、升压药与再评估核心要点。

sections.text: For suspected septic shock or sepsis with hypoperfusion, complete the 1-hour bundle: measure lactate level, obtain blood cultures before antibiotics, administer broad-spectrum antibiotics, begin rapid administration of 30 mL/kg crystalloid for hypotension or lactate >=4 mmol/L, and apply vasopressors if hypotensive during or after fluid resuscitation to maintain MAP >=65 mmHg.
Recommend an initial target mean arterial pressure of 65 mmHg in adults with septic shock. Norepinephrine is recommended as the first-line vasopressor.
